title: post api auth sign up email with valid data
description: Test user registration with valid email, password, and username to receive 201 status and session cookie or JWT.

title: post api auth sign up email with duplicate username
description: Test registration attempt with a username that already exists to receive 400 or 409 validation error indicating username is taken.

title: post api auth sign in email with valid credentials
description: Test user sign-in with valid email and password to receive 200 status and session cookie or JWT.

title: post api auth sign in email with invalid credentials
description: Test user sign-in with invalid credentials to receive 401 Unauthorized response.

title: post api teams create valid team
description: Test creating a new Pokémon team with 1-6 valid Pokémon and valid team name to receive 201 with created team ID.

title: get api teams list user teams
description: Test listing teams with authorization header to receive 200 with only the authenticated user's teams.

title: get api profiles me returns user profile
description: Test retrieving authenticated user's profile with authorization header to receive 200 with user profile and AI usage snapshot.

title: put api profiles me update bio within limit
description: Test updating authenticated user's bio with a string of 240 characters or less to receive 200 with updated profile.

title: post api ai chat send valid message
description: Test sending a chat message to the AI coach with valid teamId and message length within 2000 characters to receive 200 with assistant reply and updated usage counts.

title: get api battle presets supported game
description: Test retrieving battle presets for a supported game generation to receive 200 with supported=true and presets for gym, elite4, and champion bosses.
